headline: Growth is strong, adoption is proven, and capacity is now the binding constraint
subline: Board takeaways for the Q4 decision

blocks.proof: ARR grew $10M to $15M; enterprise added $3.0M of the $5.5M gross gain.
blocks.implication: Protect enterprise momentum before raising targets.

blocks.proof: AI workflow adoption rose from 18% to 64% of accounts in four quarters.
blocks.implication: The operating model scales; replication risk is low.

blocks.proof: Onboarding capacity covers 60% of signed enterprise commitments.
